valueString.value: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

description.value: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for resting 12-lead ECG assessment. Captures pre- and postflight ECG recordings for cardiovascular evaluation of long-duration flight crew members.

purpose.value: To assess pre- and postflight ECG recordings on long-duration flight crew members at rest using a 12-lead electrocardiogram (ECG)

copyright.value: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

valueString.value: SSP 50260 ISS Medical Operations Requirements Document (MORD); SSP 50667 Medical Evaluations Document (MED) Volume B Section 1.6
To assess pre- and postflight ECG recordings on long-duration flight crew members at rest using a 12-lead electrocardiogram (ECG)
Pre- and postflight ECG reports related to the cardiovascular examination.

text.value: Number and Type of Crew Members Required

valueString.value: Subject lies supine for 15 minutes while ECG tracings are recorded from 10 electrode sites (using chest and limb leads).
AME L-9/6 m to L-10 d & as clinically indicated
No caffeine or alcohol for 12 hours prior to testing.
Subject lies supine for 15 minutes while ECG tracings are recorded from 10 electrode sites (using chest and limb leads).
No caffeine or alcohol for 12 hours prior to testing.
